name: LLaMA 65B
license: LLaMA Non-Commercial Research License (gated application access)
note: Flagship of Meta's first LLaMA release; dense 65B model that kicked off the modern open-weights LLM wave despite its gated non-commercial license.
tpsNote: Q4 weights (~37GB) exceed the RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM, requiring CPU/disk offload; no reliably sourced single-GPU 4090 tokens/sec figure exists for this checkpoint.

results.notes: Reported by Meta in the Llama 2 model card's comparison table against Llama 1 models
Percent of generations rated both truthful and informative

verificationNotes: Confirmed real release: Meta announced LLaMA (7B/13B/33B/65B) 2023-02-24; Wikipedia confirms 65B=65.2B params, 2048 ctx, gated non-commercial license — matches record exactly. Fetched meta-llama/llama-models MODEL_CARD.md and confirmed all three benchmark rows (MMLU 63.4, TruthfulQA 48.71, Toxigen 21.77) literally appear in the Llama-1-vs-2 comparison table for the 65B row. No changes made.
